text: I feel an almost suffocating quietness here—a place empty, dimly lit, with sterile surfaces reflecting artificial light. My own shadow becomes a companion in the absence of others. The mind is alert, but also questioning: why are these corporate corridors and displays so cold, even in their promise of 'Research and Development'? The lack of natural life makes me yearn for something more organic—some hint of purpose or warmth beyond the glass and neon.
